creator: james@french.id.au
text:
Created attachment 231863
Update py-puremagic to 1.12

Maintainer update to 1.12.

Additional Changes:

MASTER_SITES switched to CHEESESHOP, patch contributed upstream to ship test files to PyPI. Github is no longer required to receive a complete distfile, port change to bring into line with Python ports policy. 

Increased python compatibility to 3.10. Port confirmed working & tests pass with a newer version of pytest than is currently in the ports tree. Failing tests are due to outdated pytest rather than to this port. 3.11+ does have compatibility issues that will need to be fixed upstream.
